educationPurpose.character-actualization: Education for personal growth, identity formation, self-discovery, transformation
educationPurpose.lifelong-practice: Continuous learning as an ongoing process without endpoint, discovery-driven
educationPurpose.sorting-class: Hierarchical selection, meritocracy, class stratification through education/testing
educationPurpose.conditioning-control: Behavioral programming, social control, indoctrination, engineered compliance
educationPurpose.mentorship-transmission: Personal teaching relationships, craft knowledge passed through human connection
educationPurpose.absent-irrelevant: Education not addressed or irrelevant to the story/world

schoolReplacement.virtual-neural: Virtual academies, neural simulations, cyberspace learning environments
schoolReplacement.ai-tutors: AI-driven teaching, machine educators, automated instruction
schoolReplacement.direct-transfer: Mind uploading, neural downloads, direct knowledge implantation
schoolReplacement.apprenticeship: Craft-based learning, guild systems, master-apprentice relationships
schoolReplacement.self-organized: Community-driven learning, voluntary collectives, peer education
schoolReplacement.unchanged: Traditional schools, universities, academies still exist
schoolReplacement.obsolete: No formal education structures, learning happens informally or not at all
